info.name: Safe HTML Viewer
info.summary: Preview HTML files safely with CSP sandbox and best-effort secret redaction
info.description:
Safely view .html / text/html files stored in Nextcloud using a strict Content-Security-Policy: sandbox (no allow-same-origin).

Optional best-effort redaction of emails, phone numbers, private IPs/URLs, and credential-like strings is applied at display time. The original file is never modified.

Designed as a "best-effort safe preview" tool to reduce accidental secret leakage when sharing HTML documents. Not a full DLP solution.
info.author: Contributors
